entity.summary: Cross-chain decentralized liquidity and exchange network whose Multichain Chaosnet launched on 2021-04-13. THORChain remained active after two Ethereum-router exploits in July 2021 prompted trading halts, reimbursement commitments, and a broad security-hardening program.
entity.notes: Entity-level umbrella record for the THORChain network. Individual frontends and chain integrations are not split into separate HEI entities.

events.title: THORChain Multichain Chaosnet launched
events.description: THORChain launched Multichain Chaosnet on 2021-04-13, enabling native cross-chain liquidity and swaps across supported assets without requiring wrapped representations on a single chain.
events.notes: Official development material provides the exact launch date.

events.title: Ethereum-router exploits halted THORChain trading
events.description: THORChain suffered two linked Ethereum-router exploits in July 2021. The incidents drained protocol assets, prompted trading halts and reimbursement commitments, and led to additional security layers before normal operation resumed.
events.notes: The representative date is the first major July exploit; the event covers the linked July 2021 exploit sequence.

evidence.title: Weekly Dev Update #89
evidence.notes: Primary project update stating that Multichain Chaosnet launched on 2021-04-13.

evidence.title: THORChain official website
evidence.notes: Current official site confirming continued network operation.

evidence.title: Post-mortem: ETH Router Exploits 1 & 2, and premature Return To Trading Incident
evidence.notes: Primary postmortem covering both router exploits, the premature return-to-trading incident, and remediation.

evidence.title: THORChain's Layers of Security
evidence.notes: Official retrospective describing security controls added after the 2021 incidents.
